name: Infinite Brianrot Maker
description: This guy is mostly brainrot. He says "skibidi toilet sigma rizzler 2000", but what counters him the most is brainrot songs. Actually no. It's just normal songs that are not brainrot. You see, when you use these songs against the infinite brainrot maker, he becomes so normal that you can have a normal everyday conversation with him and talk brainrot to him and he won't understand anything!
creator: Zxrx
